## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content production, workflow updates, and team transitions for Outreach and GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production back on track: 5-6 pieces/week, 2 published, 2 staged](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: New Airtable status + Slack notifications for staged content](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Team transitions: Megan & Jenn (GrowthX) taking over long-term; Cade joining Outreach team](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Upcoming: Full strategy review for next 8-12 weeks, Maria's PTO, Cade's onboarding (9/16)](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status

  - [2 pieces staged: "Proven sales forecasting methods" and "16 sales coaching tips"](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Production goal: 5-6 pieces/week](https://fathom.video/share/UzRj2uyXS8iWHSUAev-H9f-t4B6zPnf3?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
